headline: A Look At Duke Energy (DUK) Valuation After Upsized US$1.3b Convertible Notes Refinancing
summary: Duke Energy (DUK) has just completed a US$1.3b offering of 3.000% convertible senior notes due 2029, upsized from US$1b, with proceeds earmarked mainly to refinance convertible notes maturing in 2026. See our latest analysis for Duke Energy. That refinancing step comes after a strong run in the shares, with a 30 day share price return of 6.43% and a 90 day share price return of 13.76%. The 1 year total shareholder return sits at 14.09%, pointing to momentum that has built over time, even as...
